title: meniocus linifolius
intro: Meniocus linifolius, also known as linear-leaved menispermum, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It is a type of evergreen vine native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. Meniocus linifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and pharmaceutical applications.
